mission.title: openkruise: [feature request] upgrade Ginkgo in e2e tests to v2
mission.description: [feature request] upgrade Ginkgo in e2e tests to v2. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current openkruise deployment
steps.description:
Verify your openkruise version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openkruise -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openkruise
helm list -n openkruise 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working openkruise installation.

steps.title: Review openkruise configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant openkruise configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n openkruise -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openkruise
kubectl get configmap -n openkruise -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=openkruise
```
**What would you like to be added**:
upgrade Ginkgo library to v2 , one can follow the guide https://onsi.github.io/ginkgo/MIGRATING_TO_V2. 

**Why is this needed**:
optimize e2e test timeout and enable flaky tests automatic retry

steps.title: Apply the fix for [feature request] upgrade Ginkgo in e2e tests to v2
steps.description:
### Ⅰ. Describe what this PR does
This PR migrates the E2E test framework from Ginkgo v1 to Ginkgo v2.

### Ⅱ. Does this pull request fix one issue?
Yes, fixes #2035 

### Ⅲ. Describe how to verify it
Run the E2E test suite as usual. Verify that tests execute with the new timeouts and that flaky tests are retried automatically. All tests should pass as before.

### Ⅳ. Special notes for reviews
N/A

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n openkruise -l app.kubernetes.io/name=openkruise
kubectl get events -n openkruise --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[feature request] upgrade Ginkgo in e2e tests to v2" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
### Ⅰ. Describe what this PR does

### Ⅱ. Does this pull request fix one issue?

### Ⅳ. Special notes for reviews

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with openkruise installed or the issue environment reproducible.
